coupon.description: Race condition payloads targeting coupon/discount code single-use enforcement

payloads.payload: Send 50 simultaneous POST /apply-coupon requests with same coupon code before server can mark as used
Use Burp Turbo Intruder to send synchronized requests in the same TCP connection (HTTP/2 single-packet attack)
payloads.description: HTTP/2 single-packet race for atomic exploitation of coupon endpoint

payloads.payload: Time requests to arrive within 10ms of each other to exploit TOCTOU in coupon validation check

double_spend.description: Race condition payloads targeting financial transaction double-spend

payloads.payload: Simultaneously submit two withdrawal requests for full account balance
payloads.description: Parallel withdrawal exceeding balance check race

payloads.payload: Race POST /transfer requests before debit is committed to database
Send concurrent gift card redemption requests before card is marked as spent
payloads.description: Gift card double redemption via race condition

limit_bypass.description: Race conditions to bypass rate limits and per-user quotas

payloads.payload: Race POST /vote or POST /like requests to exceed one-vote-per-user limit
payloads.description: Vote/like limit bypass via concurrent requests

payloads.payload: Simultaneous API calls to exceed rate-limited endpoint before counter increments
payloads.description: Rate limit TOCTOU bypass with parallel requests

payloads.payload: Concurrent POST /redeem-reward to claim reward multiple times before deduction
Race PUT /upgrade-plan requests to get free tier upgraded before billing check
payloads.description: Plan upgrade race to bypass payment verification

signup.description: Race conditions in user registration and account creation flows

payloads.payload: Simultaneous POST /register with same email before uniqueness constraint is enforced
payloads.description: Duplicate account creation via registration race

payloads.payload: Race POST /verify-email with multiple OTP attempts before lockout counter increments
payloads.description: OTP brute force via race condition bypassing attempt limits

payloads.payload: Concurrent POST /claim-username before first-come assignment is committed
